definitions.text: The stem or main axis of a plant.
examples: a stalk of wheat, rye, or oats; the stalks of maize or hemp

definitions.text: The petiole, pedicel, or peduncle of a plant.
Something resembling the stalk of a plant, such as the stem of a quill.
To approach slowly and quietly in order not to be discovered when getting closer.
To (try to) follow or contact someone constantly, often resulting in harassment.
examples: villages stalked by the threat of famine

definitions.text: A particular episode of trying to follow or contact someone.
The hunting of a wild animal by stealthy approach.
